info.title: Buzz BD Agent API — SolCex Exchange
info.description: Autonomous BD intelligence and security scanning for crypto tokens. Token scoring, pipeline analytics, mining intel, Monte Carlo simulations, and BuzzShield security audits. All premium endpoints accept x402 micropayments via USDC on Base.
info.x-guidance: Use /premium/score for individual token risk scoring (pass token contract address + chain). Use /premium/pipeline for full pipeline analytics across all tracked tokens. Use /shield/scan for quick security checks and /shield/audit/full for comprehensive smart contract audits. All endpoints return JSON. Payment is handled automatically via x402 — your agent's wallet pays per-request in USDC on Base network.

get.summary: Full token pipeline analytics — scored tokens, HOT classifications, BD readiness breakdown
get.description: Returns comprehensive pipeline statistics including total tokens scored, classification distribution, scoring rules active, and BD Sweet Spot candidates.

post.summary: Score an individual token — risk metrics, liquidity analysis, BD readiness
post.description: Submit a token contract address and chain for comprehensive scoring. Returns risk score, liquidity depth, holder distribution, social signals, and BD classification (HOT/WARM/COLD).

200.description: Token score JSON with risk metrics

post.summary: Monte Carlo simulation — multi-agent consensus on token trajectory
post.description: Run a MiroFish-style Monte Carlo simulation with 20 synthetic agents evaluating a token's price trajectory, risk factors, and consensus outlook.

get.summary: PULSE mining intelligence — pool health scores, hashrate distribution, fee analysis
get.description: Returns current mining landscape: pool health rankings, hashrate distribution across top 14 pools, difficulty projections, fee floor analysis, and AntPool/Foundry comparative metrics.

post.summary: BuzzShield quick scan — contract security check with risk flags
post.description: Quick security scan of a smart contract. Returns risk flags, known vulnerability matches, audit status, and threat classification.

post.summary: BuzzShield full audit — comprehensive 265-item security audit with ETHSkills integration
post.description: Full smart contract security audit using the 265-item ETHSkills checklist. Includes Pashov-grade vulnerability detection, supply chain analysis, reentrancy checks, access control review, and threat model assessment.

200.description: Full audit report with 265-item checklist results
